rule: Adapter attach/reload/persist/parser main-chain public C APIs use bs_adapter_<module>_ or bs_adapter_attach_<subdomain>_ prefixes; deprecated bare bs_attach_context_*, bs_reload_batch_*, bs_attach_store_*, bs_config_parse_* forbidden in production surfaces. Kernel keeps bs_<module>_*. See docs/BLESSSTAR_NAMING_CONTRACT.md.
